===''Pokémon Horizons: The Series''===
[[File:Steven Stone HZ.png|thumb|250px|Steven Stone in {{aniseries|HZ}}]]
In ''[[HZ122|Roy vs. Friede: Wings of Fire!]]'', [[Friede]] revealed that, after the events of ''[[HZ089|Where the Adventure Leads]]'', he collected some samples of [[Laqua]]'s soil and took it to [[Hoenn]]'s [[Devon Corporation]], where he met with Steven, who then analyzed the samples and confirmed his suspicious about Laqua being formed by a meteor strike.
{{-}}
